versions.label: V1
versions.title: Ready for Launch
versions.pitch: Join the beta and get immediate access to everything in V1 the moment it launches.

features.name: Entry types and schemas
features.desc: Characters, places, factions, and more — with custom user-defined types for any world.

features.name: Wiki-links and backlinks
features.desc: Connect entries with [[wiki-link]] syntax. Backlinks surface automatically.

features.name: Family trees and relationship webs
features.desc: Visual family trees and relationship maps between any entry types.

features.name: Story arcs and narrative tools
features.desc: Track narrative arcs across characters, locations, and events.

features.name: Custom calendars
features.desc: Define custom months, weeks, and eras. Attach events to any calendar date.

features.name: Timeline
features.desc: Single-track linear timeline. Visual overview of your world's history.

features.name: Per-entry spoiler levels
features.desc: Mark entries with spoiler levels. Filter your world view by what you want to see.

features.name: World connections graph
features.desc: A visual graph of how every entry in your world connects to every other.

features.name: Quest and dialogue graph editor
features.desc: Node-based editor for branching quests and conversations. Global variables, conditions, simulation mode, and direct engine export.

features.name: Engine exports
features.desc: Export world data and dialogue graphs directly to Unreal Engine, Unity, and Godot.

features.name: MCP server for AI tool integration
features.desc: Connects Mimir to Claude, Cursor, and other AI tools. Your assistant knows your world.

features.name: Basic interactive maps
features.desc: Single-layer maps with markers linked to world entries.

features.name: Naming consistency engine
features.desc: CLI tool that checks your manuscript or script for naming inconsistencies against your world entries.

features.name: Ask Mimir AI assistant
features.desc: Query your entire world in natural language. Powered by Claude — knows every entry you've written.

features.name: Translator for constructed languages
features.desc: Define phonemes, grammar, and vocabulary. Translate any text into your invented language consistently.

features.name: Git auto-commit and version history
features.desc: Every change is committed automatically. Full version history, branch and merge support.

features.name: Mobile companion
features.desc: Read-only PWA for iOS and Android. Access your world on any device.

features.name: Visual and UX overhaul with biome themes
features.desc: A polished, themeable interface that matches the mood of your world.

versions.label: V1.5
versions.title: Major Expansion
versions.pitch: Subscribe to Studio at launch and every V1.5 feature is added to your account automatically — no upgrade fees.

features.name: Async git-based collaboration
features.desc: Your team's design pipeline already uses git for code. Mimir uses git for world data. Branch, merge, and resolve conflicts on your world like you would on your codebase.

features.name: Full interactive maps with time-aware layers
features.desc: Maps that show your world at any point in its history. Layer borders, settlements, and events across time.

features.name: Asset reference linking for game projects
features.desc: Link Mimir entries directly to game assets — meshes, textures, audio files — by path or reference.

features.name: Custom writing systems for languages
features.desc: Define custom scripts and writing systems for invented languages. Render text in your world's alphabet.

features.name: Manuscript editor
features.desc: Long-form writing inside Mimir, with direct wiki-link access to your world entries as you write.

features.name: Localisation workflow
features.desc: Multi-language support for game projects. Manage translations of in-game text alongside your world data.

features.name: Whiteboard and canvas integration
features.desc: A freeform canvas for planning, brainstorming, and visual worldbuilding alongside structured entries.

versions.label: V2
versions.title: Studios and Production Teams
versions.pitch: V2 features are included in Studio Pro. Subscribe to Studio Pro at launch and they're added to your account the moment they ship.

features.name: Session capture with audio transcription
features.desc: Record a worldbuilding session, design meeting, or playtest. Mimir transcribes the audio and extracts new world entries automatically.

features.name: AI-powered entry extraction
features.desc: After session capture, Mimir identifies new characters, places, factions, and events and creates draft entries for review.

features.name: Procedural lore expansion
features.desc: AI-assisted expansion of thin entries into full lore, with canon enforcement to prevent contradictions.

features.name: Branching canon for multiple endings
features.desc: Maintain separate canonical timelines for games with multiple endings or branching narratives.

features.name: Game data round-tripping with Unreal
features.desc: Push changes made in Unreal back into Mimir automatically. Your world data and game data stay in sync.

features.name: Real-time multiplayer cursors
features.desc: See where your collaborators are working in real time. Opt-in — works alongside async git collaboration.

features.name: Public template library
features.desc: Share and discover world schemas, calendar templates, and entry type collections from the Mimir community.

features.name: Engine plugin SDK
features.desc: Build your own Mimir engine integrations. Full SDK with documentation and example plugins.
